narrative:
Orrville City has 5,173 registered voters, with 55.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.9 percentage points.
